title: Impairment Reason Code
description: Categorical reason a dependency resource entered an offline state, surfacing why a media buy is impaired. Flat shared enum across resource types — per-resource-type valid subsets are documented in enumDescriptions. Buyer agents key remediation logic off reason_code; free-text 'reason' on the impairment object carries human-readable detail.

enumDescriptions.policy_violation: Seller policy enforcement removed the resource from active use. Applies to: audience, creative, catalog_item, property. Typical remediation: seller-side enforcement — buyer-side resubmit unlikely to clear; await resolution or escalate per the seller's standard contact path.
enumDescriptions.consent_expired: Consent basis for using the resource has lapsed (e.g., hashed identifier consent expiry on a synced audience). Applies to: audience. Typical remediation: refresh upstream consent and re-sync the audience via sync_audiences.
enumDescriptions.ttl_expired: Resource exceeded its time-to-live and was retired by the seller. Applies to: audience. Typical remediation: re-sync the audience via sync_audiences to renew.
enumDescriptions.pii_audit_failed: Resource failed a privacy / PII audit. Applies to: audience. Typical remediation: fix the underlying audit findings (e.g., hashing, identifier hygiene) and re-sync the audience via sync_audiences.
enumDescriptions.seller_removed: Seller withdrew the resource from active use for operational reasons not covered by other codes (e.g., inventory withdrawal). Applies to: catalog_item, audience, creative, property. Typical remediation: no buyer-side resubmit path — find a replacement via the same discovery tool used at campaign setup (get_products / get_signals / list_creative_formats), or contact the seller.
enumDescriptions.content_rejected: Previously-approved creative content was re-reviewed and rejected. Applies to: creative. Typical remediation: same path as initial creative approval — fix the issue and resubmit via sync_creatives. Buyer's campaign-level decision (replace with an alternate creative vs. wait for resubmit approval) depends on creative pool composition and is left to the buyer.
enumDescriptions.source_offline: Underlying event/signal source stopped firing (zero events received over the seller's evaluation window). Applies to: event_source. Typical remediation: verify the tag is firing on the publisher's properties and re-sync the source via sync_event_sources.
enumDescriptions.property_depublished: Property was depublished or removed from the seller's catalog via brand.json / adagents.json. Verification is via the publisher's brand.json / adagents.json files. Applies to: property. Typical remediation: no buyer-side fix — find a replacement property via get_products, or remove from targeting.
